Name: dst_crs
Description: CRS ID assigned for the project (eg, EPSG code)

Name: src_aoi_db
Description: Path to the ``aoi`` vector database (eg, a geopackage)

Name: src_aoi_layer
Description: Name of the ``aoi`` polygon in database

Name: src_canonical
Description: Path to the assigned canonical raster

Name: src_dem
Description: Path to the sourced dem file

Name: src_slope
Description: Path to the sourced slope raster file

Name: src_ldd
Description: Path to the sourced ldd raster file

Name: src_hand
Description: Path to the sourced hand raster file

Name: src_soils
Description: Path to the sourced soils raster file

Name: src_soils_attributes
Description: Path to the sourced soils attributes file

Name: src_lulc_attributes
Description: Path to the sourced lulc attributes file

Name: src_lulc_{scenario}
Description: Path to a sourced LULC scenario folder

Name: src_lulc_{scenario}_pattern
Description: Text pattern for the expected LULC files (eg. 'LULC_*.tif')
